uploader_hint: PDF, Word, Excel, PowerPoint, HTML, TXT, RTF, OFD, images (PNG/JPG/BMP/TIFF/WEBP) · up to 500 MB each
upload_error_wrong_type: {{name}} is not a supported file type.
upload_error_image_dimensions: {{name}} has unsupported dimensions. Images with aspect ratio < 2 must be 20–20000 px on each side; others must be 20–10000 px.
upload_error_per_page_unsupported: {{name}} can't be uploaded in per-page mode because we couldn't determine its page count. Per-page extraction is designed for PDFs; for other formats use whole-document mode instead.
uploader_per_page_hint: This project is in per-page mode — designed for multi-page PDFs, with one extraction created per page. Single-page files (images) and Office files are accepted as a single record. Formats without a readable page count (CSV, TXT, RTF, etc.) can't be uploaded here.
empty_subtitle: Upload your first document to start extracting data.
detail_load_failed: Failed to load the extraction result.
detail_no_extraction: No structured data was returned for this document.
detail_no_pages: This document has no page previews.
detail_processing_subtitle: We'll update this page as soon as the document is ready.
detail_failed_subtitle: The extraction pipeline couldn't finish for this document.
stale_tooltip: This document was extracted with an older schema. Re-extract to apply the latest fields.
stale_banner_subtitle: The extracted data does not match the project's current schema. Re-extract to refresh it.
rerun_confirm_description: This will consume page quota again. Ztract will bill the real page count after processing.
rerun_stale_confirm_description_one: {{countLabel}} document is out of date with the current schema. Re-extracting will consume an estimated {{pages}} pages of quota; the actual cost is billed by Ztract after each document finishes.
rerun_stale_confirm_description_other: {{countLabel}} documents are out of date with the current schema. Re-extracting will consume an estimated {{pages}} pages of quota; the actual cost is billed by Ztract after each document finishes.
rerun_stale_confirm_description_no_estim: {{countLabel}} document is out of date with the current schema. Quota usage cannot be estimated for this batch; the actual cost is billed by Ztract after each document finishes.
{{countLabel}} documents are out of date with the current schema. Quota usage cannot be estimated for this batch; the actual cost is billed by Ztract after each document finishes.
delete_confirm_description: This will permanently delete "{{name}}" and its extraction result. This action cannot be undone.
